basics.name: Gregory Tomy
basics.label: Final semester Applied Mathematics graduate student

work.name: Global Foundries
highlights: Implemented an XGBoost digital twin of the Technology Computer-Aided Design (TCAD) process, achieving over 50% reduction in training time relative to existing deep learning model, while maintaining accuracy.
Developed and optimized data generation scripts for the TCAD machine learning pipeline.

work.name: Sandia National Laboratories
highlights: Built a deep learning model to predict the impact of atmospheric SO2 injections on temperature using a 15-year dataset with over 5.4 million rows and PyTorch.

work.name: CVS Health
highlights: Built a deep learning model to predict the impact of atmospheric SO2 injections on temperature using a 15-year dataset with over 5.4 million rows and PyTorch.
